block_00: Aapke address ke pramaan ki samay-seema sheeghra hi samaapt ho jayegi
block_02: Hum aapko yah suchit karne ke liye likh rahen hain ki aapke nivaas ke pramaan ki avdhi
block_04: din (dinon) me samaapt ho jayegi aur aapka account ab satyaapit nahin kiya jaa sakega. Money laundering aur terrorist financing ki rokathaam aur daman ke liye Anti-money Laundering aur Terrorist Financing Law ke tahat yah compnay ki vaidh jimmedaari hai ki vah pratyek trader se navinatam dastaavejon ka anurodh karen aur unka rakhrakhaav kare.
block_05: Isliye, aapse anurodh hai ki hamen nimnalikhit me se ek pradaan karen:
block_07: Apne bank account ke sambandh me bank statement ya patra;
block_08: Aapke tax pradhikaran se Tax bill;
block_09: Aapki nagar paalika se muharband nivaas pramaan patra.
block_10: Pradaan kiye jaane vaale dastaavej me spasht rup se aapka pura naam, pata, logo ya company/bank/nagar paalika ke muhar aur jaari karne ki taarikh (6 mahine se adhik purani nahin) honi chahiyen.
block_11: kripya dastaavej ki keval purn ya aadhe prishth ki pratiyaan pradaan karen (kaate gaye ya dhundhale dastaavej svikaar nahin kiye jayenge).
block_12: Hum is maamale me aapke sahyog ki sarahana karte hain aur aapke liye uplabdh rahte hain.
block_17: Yadi aapke paas koi prashna hai to humari
block_19: ko aapki madad karne me khushi hogi.
